concept: Participate / To Be an Open Part of the Collective
description: The act of taking part in a collective activity. It is the expression of belonging and co-creation within a group, contributing one's part to the whole.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'we' (the collective) and 'a' (openness), and a new proposed root 'pa' (a part, a piece). The word's structure means 'to be an open part of the collective.' This beautifully defines participation as the act of contributing one's individual part to the open, shared space of the group.
